about:
The Indian Institute of Technology Bombay (IIT Bombay) is one of India’s most prestigious and globally recognized institutions for higher education in engineering, science, design, and management. Established in 1958, it is located in Powai, Mumbai, and is widely known for its academic excellence, cutting-edge research, and vibrant campus life.

🎓 Academic Excellence

IIT Bombay offers a wide range of undergraduate, postgraduate, and doctoral programs across multiple disciplines, including engineering, technology, sciences, humanities, and management. The institute follows a rigorous academic curriculum combined with practical learning, encouraging students to innovate and solve real-world problems.

It is consistently ranked among the top engineering institutes in India and has gained strong international recognition for its research output and academic standards.
